overview: Modern media is rapidly changing, presenting new challenges to journalism and communication professionals all around the world. Our Department of Journalism, Media and Communication is the right choice for you to start exploring the profession and learn the skills and philosophy of the media from veterans of media and online journalism. Our experienced and highly trained teachers in our department make sure that students learn how to report and communicate news, create ads, produce video and audio for both radio and TV, shoot photos, with all forms of new media technology, and publish them on all platforms.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (Bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (Semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Quota position, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
eligibility: Students passing with SSC and HSC examination in Arts/Commerce/Science or equivalent courses and obtaining minimum CGPA of 2.50 in SSC & HSC each with minimum CGPA of 6.00 in all subjects. Students from English medium, have to complete 5 subjects in level 1 and 2 in A level. Out of these 7 subjects, 4 have to be minimum B and 3 have to be minimum C. D grade is not acceptable.
career_opportunities: Journalist for electronic & print media like television, radio, newspaper, magazine, news agency, online journalism and so on...
Media professionals in international and national agencies
Have opportunities in UN, UND, UNICEF
Communication personnel in government organizations, NGOs and multinational organizations
facilities: Credit transfer & exchange program in foreign universities
intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec
